<!-- tuya-triage-bot -->
Hey! I've peeked into the fingerprints shared here. Here's what I found:

### 🚧 Driver Enrichment
Not supported yet: `_TZE284_fhvpaltk`
I've added these to the internal research queue for the next release. If you can share a [Developer Tools interview](https://tools.developer.homey.app), especially the **External State** and **Endpoints** tabs, that helps me map the data points correctly.

*Side note:* This app also supports Tuya WiFi models with local LAN control - check the [forum](https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352) for details.

<!-- tuya-issue-manager -->
Hey @tjoepatjoep,

Thanks for providing all the detailed information about the Insoma Two Way Irrigation Valve. I see that you've done your homework with the Zigbee fingerprint and pairing notes, which is super helpful.

From your findings, it looks like the fingerprint `_TZE284_fhvpaltk + TS0601` isn't currently recognized in our driver database, which is likely why you're experiencing issues. This means we need to create a new driver for this specific device.

Given the capabilities you expect (output 1 on/off, output 2 on/off, and battery state), I’ll start working on implementing support for these features. I’ll also need to ensure that the input and output clusters are correctly mapped to handle the commands.

Could you please provide any app logs if you have them? They can help me extract more data points (DPs) that might be useful for the driver development.

I'll keep you updated on the progress. Thanks for your willingness to test the driver once it's ready!

Cheers!
--
